fields.Name: GW01 - MDN Home Loads
fields.Description: Navigates to the MDN Web Docs home page and verifies the landing page renders with its main navigation. Demonstrates Mode C variable templating ({{baseUrl}}) — no MJ assumptions, no auth.

InputDefinition.goal: Verify the home page has loaded successfully. Look for the main navigation header (References, Guides, Plus) and the prominent 'MDN Web Docs' branding. Do NOT click anything — just confirm the page rendered without errors and the nav elements are visible.

judgeValidationCriteria: Main navigation visible (References, Guides, or similar)
